subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath aided His servants to turn towards Him and hath revealed unto them that which lay hidden in knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اید عباده علی الاقبال الیه و اظهر لهم ما کان مکنونا فی العلم و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
